title: PHP Door Mat - Waterproof Strong PVC Rubber Backing Anti Slip Heavy Duty Dirt Trapper Barrier Mats for Kitchen Bedroom Hall Hallway Entrance Door Matts (40 x 60 cm, Grey)
features: WATERPROOF OUTDOOR MAT: This outdoor mat with durable, premium quality, and all-weather PVC material. Making it have higher tensile strength, higher tear resistance, and fewer smells than other rubber door mats

COMPLETE PROTECTION: Protect high traffic interior hardwood or entry door tile floors from scratches, water, sand, dirt, mess, and molding. Create a safe, stable, anti-slip, and water-resistant surface near bathroom sinks and laundry room washers. Give outdoor grills strength and save your patio, or cement pad from splatter stains

NON SLIP RUBBER BACKING: Indoor door mat designed with durable and unique PVC RUBER on the bottom help to stay in place and doesn’t slide away, even with active pets. Catch excess dirt and debris from dirty shoes, boots, cleats, and paws, and keep your house clean.

EASY TO CLEAN: Simply vacuum the doormat with a hand-held vacuum, sweep with a broom, or shake off the doormat outside. The RUBBER floor mat adds classy decor to your entryway, front door, home, lobby, office, patio, garage, business, barn, living spaces, driveway, and other common areas!

PPREMIUM QUALITY ASSURANCE- Our outdoor indoor mat with the low-profile design ensures that doors won't get stuck. If you have any issues with the rubber door mat contact us today and we’ll gladly make it right.
